summary: Cavallo multi-purpose pocketknife with scissors, corkscrew, screwdriver heads and knife blades, pitched as a trail-riding survival pack addition. Includes the standard 180-day Best Boot warranty text.
Cavallo tail brush for detangling a horse's mane and tail. Page also carries the standard Cavallo guarantee and 180-day warranty details.
Product page for the book 'There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven', which examines horses' natural way of being and husbandry changes for hoof health and soundness.
Bio of Carole Herder, President of Cavallo, covering her path into equine well-being, the barefoot movement, and her stance against nailing metal shoes into hooves.
Bio of Greg Giles, CEO of Cavallo Horse & Rider Inc., detailing his footwear design background, Old Macs history, and leadership in barefoot hoof-boot development for laminitis and navicular.
Minimal team page for Patricia, Cavallo's Chief Financial Officer; only the role is listed.
Bio of Krystle Davies, Cavallo Customer Experience Manager, covering her horse background, joining Cavallo in 2009, and her psychology degree and hobby farm in B.C.
Bio of Jennifer Mundell, Cavallo Relations Coordinator, who handles social media, marketing and equine-industry partnerships since 2015.
Product page for the Mustad 'Double S' Loop Hoof Knife, an ambidextrous, ergonomically designed hoof knife with a hardened steel blade for trimming the sole, frog and bar.
Bio of Yvonne Welz, a lifelong horsewoman, former dressage rider, and founder of The Horse's Hoof Magazine, who promotes barefoot hoof care and uses Cavallo boots daily.
Bio of Brigitta Luettge, Cavallo Customer Experience Expert, with 28 years of horse experience from owning SweetWater Ranch in Whistler, BC.
Bio of Heidi Melocco, Cavallo's Public Relations & Press contact, a longtime equine publishing author and PATH International instructor who promotes new products and equine wellness.
